zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte於1343年1月14日出生在英國諾福爾可時，他的父親Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz19歲，母親Margery St Philibert18歲。他於大約1363年與Margaret Norwich結婚。他去世於1389年6月2日在英國艾可享年46歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可維廷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte于1343年1月14日出生在英国諾福爾可时，他的父亲Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz19岁，母亲Margery St Philibert18岁。他于大约1363年与Margaret Norwich结婚。他去世于1389年6月2日在英国艾可享年46岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可維廷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Plaiz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Rainer.
South German (Swabia): nickname for a clumsy person, a variant of dialect Plantsch.

variants.name: Pflanz
meanings: South German: topographic name denoting someone who lived by or owned a plantation, from Middle High German pflanze ‘plant’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte was born on 14 January 1343, in Norfolk, England, his father, Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz, was 19 and his mother, Margery St Philibert, was 18. He married Margaret Norwich about 1363. He died on 2 June 1389, in Essex, England, at the age of 46, and was buried in Weeting, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte est né le 14 janvier 1343, à Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margery St Philibert, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Norwich environ 1363. Il est décédé le 2 juin 1389, à Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Weeting, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.Buckenham Tofts, Swaffham, Norfolk, Engl: Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte am 14. Januar 1343 in Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz 19 und seine Mutter Margery St Philibert 18. Er hat um 1363 Margaret Norwich geheiratet. Er starb am 2. Juni 1389 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Essex, England und wurde in Weeting, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte è nato il il 14 gennaio 1343 nel Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margery St Philibert, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Norwich circa 1363. Morì il 2 giugno 1389, nel Essex, England, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Weeting, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron John de Plaiz of Tofteが1343年1月14日にイギリスノーフォルクで生まれた時，父Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaizは19歳，母Margery St Philibertは18歳であった。約1363年にMargaret Norwichと結婚した。彼は1389年6月2日にイギリスエセックスで46歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクウィーティングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte(이)가 1343년 1월 14일 영국 노르폴크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery St Philibert(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1363년 Margaret Norwich(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1389년 6월 2일 영국 에세스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 위틴그에 묻혔다.

pt.Buckenham Tofts, Swaffham, Norfolk, Engl: Buckenham Parva, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte nasceu em 14 de janeiro de 1343, em Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margery St Philibert, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Norwich aproximadamente 1363. Ele faleceu em 2 de junho de 1389, em Essex, Inglaterra, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Weeting, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron John de Plaiz of Tofte родился 14 января 1343 г. в местности норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Baron Plaiz Richard de Plaiz было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery St Philibert, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Norwich около 1363 г. Он умер 2 июня 1389 г. в местности эссекс, Англия в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности витинг, норфолк, Англия.

Se casó con Margaret Norwich aproximadamente 1363. Murió el 2 de junio de 1389, en Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultado en Weeting, Norfolk, Inglaterra.
